title: abelmoschus brevicapsulatus
intro: Abelmoschus brevicapsulatus, also known as the Indian mallow, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Abelmoschus brevicapsulatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as dried into capsules or tinctures, making it accessible in various forms for medicinal purposes.
